structure_issues.issue: Syntax error: unterminated string literal (detected at line 227) (<unknown>, line 227)

limitations.description: MITRE ATT&CK coverage at 71.4% - missing 4 tactics
Only 8 datasets available - limited generalization testing
limitations.impact: Model may not generalize to unseen data distributions

limitations.description: No dedicated streaming pipeline for real-time SIEM ingestion
Limited explanation generation for HGNN cluster assignments
limitations.impact: SOC analysts cannot understand why alerts were correlated

limitations.description: Union-Find algorithm O(n log n) may not scale to millions of events
Limited long-range temporal dependency modeling (attack chains spanning days)
Models trained on network data may not work on host-based logs
limitations.impact: Requires separate models for different data types

limitations.description: No explicit false positive learning from analyst feedback
limitations.impact: Repeated false correlations may erode trust

recommendations.recommendation: Refactor 54 identified redundancies into shared utility modules
Add unit tests for all dataset loaders (current coverage: ~20%)
Complete tactic mapping for remaining 4 ATT&CK tactics
Implement streaming pipeline with Kafka/Redis for real-time processing
Add attention visualization and cluster explanation generation
Implement hierarchical clustering for billion-scale event processing
Extend to unified model for network + host + cloud logs
Integrate LLM for natural language threat report generation
Enable multi-organization model training without data sharing
Implement analyst feedback loop for continuous model improvement

correlation_accuracy.note: Above average, but below top performers (Chronicle, Splunk ES)

processing_speed.note: Better than average, but real-time leaders are faster

dataset_diversity.note: Good coverage, but could include more modern datasets

explainability.note: Gap in explainability compared to leaders
